div.class: col-md-6 o_cc o_cc4 pb24 pt24 col-12

p.font: Color blocks are a simple and effective way to present and highlight your content. Choose an image or a color for the background. You can even resize and duplicate the blocks to create your own layout. Add images or icons to customize the blocks.

div.class: col-md-6 o_cc o_cc5 pb24 pt24 col-12

p.font: Color blocks are a simple and effective way to present and highlight your content. Choose an image or a color for the background. You can even resize and duplicate the blocks to create your own layout. Add images or icons to customize the blocks.
